name: Ezo Pmp → Dose Volume Over Time
description: Use this action in an [automations](https://esphome.io/automations) to have the peristaltic pump dose an specific `volume` (in milliliters) over the provided `duration` (in minutes). At the end of the time period the pump will have dosed the specified `volume`. If the volume is negative the pump will run backwards.

config_entries.label: Duration
config_entries.description: The time (in minutes) the pump will take to dose the volume requested.

config_entries.label: Volume
config_entries.description: The volume to dose in milliliters. If negative, pump will run in reverse.
